title: Thumbnail Maker+
description: Make your Dream Thumbnail and get fps
body:
### **Thumbnail Maker+**

**A modpack to make your dream thumbnail**

**This is the best thumbnail making modpack ever,**

**with this modpack you can make your dream thumbnail for**

**your minecraft videos**

###  Here are some feature you will get 
-------------------------------------------------------
- **Fps Optimization**
  
- **The Npc Mod for your Thumbnail**
  
- **New Mobs and Model for the Npc mod**

- **It can help you make your thumbnail look better**

- **This modpack also includes BSL shaders for extra depth to your npc**

<details>
<summary>READ</summary>

**POINT TO REMEMBER THIS MODPACK IS NOT MADE FOR SINGLEPLAYER NOR MULTIPLAYER ITS PURPOSE IS TO MAKE YOUR VIDEO'S THUMBNAIL LOOK BETTER**
</details>
